metadata.title: Fan Art: Red Dead Redemption 2 Photography by Sindy JB - Rockstar Games
metadata.ogTitle: Fan Art: Red Dead Redemption 2 Photography by Sindy JB - Rockstar Games
metadata.twitter:description: Whether it's breathtaking landscapes or expert composition, Sindy JB — also known as Mesopotamian_meow on Instagram — is a prolific digital photographer capturing the beauty and color of the American West in Red Dead Redemption 2.
